title: A cheap spam gate makes the graph dark on junk; a faceted router turns one inbox into selective channels.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the support inbox lights once · gateway → triage → router → channel listeners

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: byte-identical re-scan · the whole graph SKIPS · cost flat near zero

beats.name: spam-dark
beats.caption: HERO: a spam email · the cheap filter renders · its `routed` facet stays NULL · the router and every channel listener stay DARK

beats.name: docs-only
beats.caption: a docs question · the router moves ONLY docs-questions · ONLY the docs gap tracker wakes · the bug board and roadmap stay dark

beats.name: bug-only
beats.caption: a bug report · the router moves ONLY bug-reports · ONLY the bug board wakes

beats.name: self-tick
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · the docs gap tracker re-checks its valid_until · inputs unmoved · no edges, no cost

beats.name: docs-dedup
beats.caption: a duplicate docs question · same canonical content · docs-questions does NOT move · the docs gap tracker dedup-skips

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: it goes quiet again · billing never had a consumer · cost back to flat
